001package com.stuypulse.robot.util.simulation;
002
003import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
004
005
006import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
007import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose3d;
008import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation2d;
009import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation3d;
010import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation2d;
011import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation3d;
012import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.*;
013import edu.wpi.first.util.struct.StructSerializable;
014
015/**
016 *
017 *
018 * <h2>Record that holds CAD Offsets</h2>
019 *
020 * <p>
021 * Sourced from CAD exports to hold a component's positional offsets from their
022 * position in CAD
023 * to their position in sim
024 *
025 * <pre>{@code
026 * Offsets SHOOTER = new Offsets(-0.1016, 0.2032, 0.3255,
027 *         Degrees.of(90), Degrees.of(0), Degrees.of(-90));
028 *
029 * Pose3d shooterPose = SHOOTER.withRotation(
030 *         new Rotation3d(0, 0, turretSim.getAngle().getRadians()));
031 * }</pre>
032 *
033 * @param x     X translation from the robot origin (meters)
034 * @param y     Y translation from the robot origin (meters)
035 * @param z     Z translation from the robot origin (meters)
036 * @param roll  Rotation about the X axis
037 * @param pitch Rotation about the Y axis
038 * @param yaw   Rotation about the Z axis
039 */
040public record Offsets (
041        Distance x, Distance y, Distance z, Angle roll, Angle pitch, Angle yaw)
042        implements StructSerializable {
043    public static final OffsetsStruct struct = new OffsetsStruct();
044
045    /**
046     *
047     *
048     * <h4>Constructs an Offsets instance with no rotation</h4>
049     *
050     * @param x X translation from the robot origin (meters)
051     * @param y Y translation from the robot origin (meters)
052     * @param z Z translation from the robot origin (meters)
053     */
054    public Offsets(double x, double y, double z) {
055        this(Meters.of(x), Meters.of(y), Meters.of(z), Radians.of(0), Radians.of(0), Radians.of(0));
056    }
057
058    /**
059     *
060     *
061     * <h4>Constructs an Offsets instance with no rotation, using your unit of
062     * choice</h4>
063     *
064     * @param x X translation from the robot origin
065     * @param y Y translation from the robot origin
066     * @param z Z translation from the robot origin
067     */
068    public Offsets(Distance x, Distance y, Distance z) {
069        this(x.in(Meters), y.in(Meters), z.in(Meters));
070    }
071
072    /**
073     *
074     *
075     * <h4>Constructs an Offsets instance with no translation</h4>
076     *
077     * @param roll  Rotation about the X axis
078     * @param pitch Rotation about the Y axis
079     * @param yaw   Rotation about the Z axis
080     */
081    public Offsets(Angle roll, Angle pitch, Angle yaw) {
082        this(Meters.of(0), Meters.of(0), Meters.of(0), roll, pitch, yaw);
083    }
084
085    /**
086     *
087     *
088     * <h4>Constructs an Offsets instance with no rotation</h4>
089     *
090     * @param x     X translation from the robot origin (meters)
091     * @param y     Y translation from the robot origin (meters)
092     * @param z     Z translation from the robot origin (meters)
093     * @param roll  Rotation about the X axis
094     * @param pitch Rotation about the Y axis
095     * @param yaw   Rotation about the Z axis
096     */
097    public Offsets(double x, double y, double z, Angle roll, Angle pitch, Angle yaw) {
098        this(Meters.of(x), Meters.of(y), Meters.of(z), roll, pitch, yaw);
099    }
100
101    /**
102     *
103     *
104     * <h4>Translational component as a {@link Translation3d}</h4>
105     *
106     * @return translation from the robot origin
107     */
108    public Translation3d toTranslation3d() {
109        return new Translation3d(x.in(Meters), y.in(Meters), z.in(Meters));
110    }
111
112    /**
113     *
114     *
115     * <h4>Rotational component as a {@link Rotation3d}</h4>
116     *
117     * @return Rotation3d of the roll, pitch, and yaw components of the offset
118     */
119    public Rotation3d toRotation3d() {
120        return new Rotation3d(roll, pitch, yaw);
121    }
122
123    /**
124     *
125     *
126     * <h4>This offset as a {@link Pose3d}.</h4>
127     *
128     * <p>
129     * Useful for components whose pose is fully static and requires no adjustments
130     *
131     * @return pose at this offset's position and orientation
132     */
133    public Pose3d toPose3d() {
134        return new Pose3d(toTranslation3d(), toRotation3d());
135    }
136
137    /**
138     *
139     *
140     * <h4>Applies this offset's translation and rotation onto an existing
141     * {@link Pose3d}</h4>
142     *
143     * @param pose the base pose to offset
144     * @return a new pose with this offset applied to both translation and rotation
145     */
146    public Pose3d applyToPose3d(Pose3d pose) {
147        return new Pose3d(
148                pose.getMeasureX().plus(x),
149                pose.getMeasureY().plus(y),
150                pose.getMeasureZ().plus(z),
151                applyToRotation3d(pose.getRotation()));
152    }
153
154    /**
155     *
156     *
157     * <h4>Applies this offset's translation and rotation onto an existing
158     * {@link Pose3d}</h4>
159     *
160     * <p>
161     * Translation is applied, but it is <b>robot robot relative</b>
162     *
163     * @param pose the base pose to offset
164     * @return a new pose with this offset applied to both translation and rotation
165     */
166    public Pose3d applyToPose3dRobotRelative(Pose3d pose) {
167        Translation3d rotatedOffset = toTranslation3d().rotateBy(pose.getRotation());
168        return new Pose3d(
169                pose.getTranslation().plus(rotatedOffset), applyToRotation3d(pose.getRotation()));
170    }
171
172    /**
173     *
174     *
175     * <h4>Composes this offset's rotation onto an existing {@link Rotation3d}</h4>
176     *
177     * @param rotation the base rotation to offset
178     * @return a new rotation with this offset's rotation applied on top
179     */
180    public Rotation3d applyToRotation3d(Rotation3d rotation) {
181        return new Rotation3d(
182                rotation.getX() + roll.in(Radians),
183                rotation.getY() + pitch.in(Radians),
184                rotation.getZ() + yaw.in(Radians));
185    }
186
187    /**
188     *
189     *
190     * <h4>Pose at this offset's translation with an additional rotation</h4>
191     *
192     * <p>
193     * Applies a rotation to this offsets rotation
194     *
195     * <pre>{@code
196     * SHOOTER_OFFSETS.withRotation(
197     *         new Rotation3d(0, 0, turretSim.getAngle().getRadians()));
198     * }</pre>
199     *
200     * @param rotation the additional rotation to add to this offset's rotation
201     * @return a new pose at this offset's translation with the combined rotation
202     */
203    public Pose3d withRotation(Rotation3d rotation) {
204        return new Pose3d(toTranslation3d(), toRotation3d().plus(rotation));
205    }
206
207    /**
208     *
209     *
210     * <h4>Applies this offset's X/Y translation and yaw onto an existing
211     * {@link Pose2d}</h4>
212     *
213     * <p>
214     * Roll and pitch are ignored because they have no 2D equivalent
215     *
216     * @param pose the base 2D pose to offset
217     * @return a new pose of this offset's X, Y, and yaw
218     */
219    public Pose2d applyToPose2d(Pose2d pose) {
220        return new Pose2d(
221                pose.getMeasureX().plus(x),
222                pose.getMeasureY().plus(y),
223                applyToRotation2d(pose.getRotation()));
224    }
225
226    /**
227     *
228     *
229     * <h4>Applies this offset's X/Y translation and yaw onto an existing
230     * {@link Pose2d}</h4>
231     *
232     * <p>
233     * Translation is applied, but it is <b>robot robot relative</b>
234     *
235     * @param pose the base 2D pose to offset
236     * @return a new pose with this offset applied
237     */
238    public Pose2d applyToPose2dRobotRelative(Pose2d pose) {
239        Translation2d rotatedOffset = new Translation2d(x, y).rotateBy(pose.getRotation());
240        return new Pose2d(
241                pose.getTranslation().plus(rotatedOffset), applyToRotation2d(pose.getRotation()));
242    }
243
244    /**
245     *
246     *
247     * <h4>Applies this offset's yaw onto an existing {@link Rotation2d}</h4>
248     *
249     * <p>
250     * Roll and pitch are ignored because they have no 2D equivalent
251     *
252     * @param rotation the base 2D rotation to offset
253     * @return a new rotation with this offset's yaw applied on top
254     */
255    public Rotation2d applyToRotation2d(Rotation2d rotation) {
256        return new Rotation2d(rotation.getRadians() + yaw.in(Radians));
257    }
258}
